bool Exiv2::AsfVideo::GUIDTag::operator== ( const GUIDTag & other) const

Look-up list for ASF Type Video Files Associates the GUID with its Name(i.e. Human Readable Form) Tags have been differentiated into Various Categories. The categories have been listed above Groups see :

  • https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Advanced_Systems_Format
  • https://exse.eyewated.com/fls/54b3ed95bbfb1a92.pdf
